title: 2026 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia
description: West Virginia voters will elect one U.S. senator in 2026 for the state’s Class II seat. The race is notable because it is an open-seat-style contest in the sense that the current senator, Shelley Moore Capito, is running for reelection while the seat is also part of the broader fight for Senate control; Ballotpedia rates the race as solid/safe Republican. West Virginia has trended strongly Republican in recent federal elections, and the main contrast in the race is likely to be between the GOP incumbent’s record and the Democratic nominee chosen in the May primary.
polling_note: No public general-election polling found for this race as of 2026-04-01.

candidates.name: Shelley Moore Capito
candidates.summary: Shelley Moore Capito is the incumbent U.S. senator from West Virginia and is seeking reelection in 2026. Her campaign and Senate biography emphasize her long record in West Virginia politics, her work on infrastructure, broadband, and regulatory issues, and her alignment with conservative priorities.

summary_sources.title: Shelley Moore Capito for U.S. Senate
United States Senate election in West Virginia, 2026 - Ballotpedia

career_history.title: United States Senator
career_history.description: Represents West Virginia in the U.S. Senate; has served since 2015.

career_history.title: U.S. Representative
career_history.description: Represented West Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District for seven terms.

career_history.title: Member
career_history.description: Served in the state House before election to Congress.

candidates.name: Thornton Cooper
candidates.summary: Thornton Cooper is a Democratic candidate in the 2026 West Virginia U.S. Senate primary. Ballotpedia lists him among the declared Democratic primary candidates, but a detailed public campaign biography was not readily available in the sources reviewed.

candidates.name: Zachary Shrewsbury
candidates.summary: Zachary Shrewsbury is a Democratic candidate in the 2026 West Virginia U.S. Senate primary and was also a 2024 Senate candidate in the state. Ballotpedia’s race page shows him as an active candidate with notable fundraising relative to other Democrats in the field, but the sources reviewed did not provide a full current campaign biography for this cycle.
